hero.question: Will the DHS shutdown end after March 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: The crowd is pricing an 80% chance the DHS shutdown ends by March 31, 2026, which bakes in Congress actually passing a budget before the deadline, a bar they've cleared exactly once in the last 13 years. The real catalyst is whether Republicans use the DHS as leverage for border policy demands in Q1 2026, and at 80% this market isn't pricing enough tail risk for a prolonged standoff that bleeds past March.

daily_take.headline: DHS Shutdown Odds Spike 10 Points. Congress Just Signaled the Real Play.
daily_take.deck: The market priced a 79.9% chance DHS avoids shutdown past March 31, up 10 points in 24 hours after Congress moved toward a continuing resolution. But the sharp money knows March deadlines are theater. The real test hits when supplemental spending debates collide with election year posturing in Q2. Smart bettors should fade this rally and wait for the actual flashpoint.

sidebar.headline: Iran play collapsed 0.5 points, but 16.5% still assumes zero escalation through Q1. Military operations move fast and markets move slower.
sidebar.label: US Forces Enter Iran: 16.5%

sidebar.headline: Arizona rallied 2.2 points to 20.2%. The market is pricing in their full roster staying healthy for a March run. Injuries tank tournament odds fast.
sidebar.label: Arizona 2026 NCAA Champion: 20.2%

sidebar.headline: Anduril IPO cratered 22 points in one day. Defense funding volatility just became real. Watch defense spending bills as a proxy for this trade.
sidebar.label: Anduril IPO Before 2027: 28.5%
